hooks.command: $j = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $p = $j.tool_input.file_path; if ($p -like '*TheDeskWatch.MobileApp.csproj') { Write-Output '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"BLOCKED: The MobileApp .csproj requires user review before any modification. Explain what change is needed and why, then wait for explicit approval before proceeding."}'; exit 2 }; if ($p -like '*\Platforms\*' -or $p -like '*/Platforms/*') { Write-Output '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"BLOCKED: Platforms/ files can break the mobile app (e.g. ApplicationId, permissions, Info.plist, AndroidManifest.xml). Before modifying, you must first explain: (1) which platform this targets (Android or iOS), (2) exactly what change is needed, (3) why it is required - then wait for explicit user approval."}'; exit 2 }

$branch = git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD; if ($branch -eq 'main') { Write-Output '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Blocked: cannot commit directly to main. Create a worktree first: git worktree add ../<branch-name> -b <branch-name>"}'; exit 1 }

dotnet build TheDeskWatch.slnx; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Output '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Build failed — fix compilation errors before committing."}'; exit 1 }; dotnet test TheDeskWatch.slnx --no-build; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Output '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Tests failed — fix failing unit tests before committing."}'; exit 1 }
hooks.statusMessage: Checking build and tests before commit...
